name: Practical Assessment Awaiting Review
subject: Practical Assessment awaiting review: {{ doc.name }}

name: Practical Assessment Sent Back
subject: Practical Assessment sent back for changes: {{ doc.name }}
message: Your practical assessment {{ doc.name }} for apprentice {{ doc.student }} was sent back by the reviewer and needs changes before resubmission.

name: Practical Assessment Signed Off
subject: Practical Assessment signed off: {{ doc.name }}
message:
The practical assessment {{ doc.name }} for competency {{ doc.competency }} has been signed off.

Outcome: {{ doc.outcome }}

The apprentice can view and acknowledge this via the portal at /my-practical-assessments.
